2229000.name: Anigma
2229000.description:
Express yourself using 3D avatars with Anigma. Easily capture facial expression, upper-body and hand movements with a single webcam. Anigma supports virtual camera, which enables you to connect friends and family in other streaming/chat platforms like Zoom, Skype, and Discord.
You can also use iPhone for facial capture, which is optimized for perfect-sync model. To use iPhone, it requires additional app settings. Any VRM can be imported to Anigma. Download avatar from VRoid Hub and bring your avatar to life today!

Thank you for supporting!
